title: cenchrus laevigatus
intro: Cenchrus laevigatus, also known as Smooth Bristle Grass or Smooth Spikemoss, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus laevigatus include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Cenchrus laevigatus can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often consumed to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
